name: Laser Blaster
description: A crisp beam emitter built for precision takedowns.

name: Plasma Shotgun
description: A wide plasma burst that clips every foe in front of you.

name: Rocket Launcher
description: Heavy ordnance that takes time to line up, then detonates across the battlefield.

name: Shock Fists
description: Gauntlets that crackle with a focused "shock" jab.

name: Quake Knuckles
description: A heavy sweep that rattles the whole line.

name: Maul Gauntlet
description: A charged impact that detonates into a shockwave.

name: Prism Focus
description: A refined jewel that sharpens a psychic beam.

name: Halo Array
description: Diffuse light that grazes every target at once.

name: Stasis Core
description: Builds a charge before snapping targets in a psychic burst.

name: Whisperblade
description: A razor-thin edge built for silent takedowns.

name: Splitter Edge
description: A sweeping blade that tags every foe in range.

name: Void Fang
description: A charged lunge that erupts into a void surge.

name: Bulwark Plate
description: Reinforced plating built to soak the hardest hits.

name: Surge Harness
description: Shock-dampened straps that keep a bruiser light on his feet.

name: Brawler Rig
description: Weighted buckles that turn every swing into a statement.

name: Ward Coat
description: Layered fibers that steady the line and protect allies.

name: Channeler Mantle
description: A calm weave that sharpens focus under pressure.

name: Driftweave Cloak
description: A weightless cloak for constant repositioning.

name: Nullguard Coat
description: A dense coat that buys time when the ambush turns.

name: Phaseweave Jacket
description: Flickering panels that help you slip between strikes.

name: Killer Harness
description: Lean rigging tuned for ruthless, accurate cuts.

name: Scraprunner Jacket
description: A patched jacket that keeps Ollie fast and focused.

name: Helioguard Plate
description: Sunburst plating that steadies Nova through recoil.

name: Flux Liner
description: Lightweight layers that keep Nova dancing between volleys.

name: Starline Jacket
description: Luminous threading keeps Nova steady while charging the next shot.

name: Trailblazer Vest
description: A rugged vest tuned for Ollie's scrappy scouting.

name: Canopy Mantle
description: Leaf-styled layers that hide Ollie in the treeline.

name: Basic Slingshot
description: Careful not to shoot yer eye out.

name: Battery Pack
description: A simple battery pack for providing a charge.

name: Black Coffee
Broken Arcade Display
description: The broken display of Sam & Ellie's arcade cabinet. Might just need a new filament.

name: Broken Coffee Grinder
description: A broken industrial coffee grinder. Maybe reinforcing this with some additional metal could fix it.

name: Broken Projector
description: A broken projector. It looks like this one is going to need a new circuit board.

name: Digital Watch
description: Harnesses the power of time.

name: Ellie's Signature Sampler
description: A little bit of everything from your friends at Sam & Ellie's Diner!

name: Gadget Belt
description: Now all you need is a cape and a cowl.

name: Starbar Crunch
description: Compressed carbs and caffeine. Tastes like chalk and panic. Keeps your hands from shaking.

name: Mineral Trail Mix
description: Rock-hard protein nibs. The salt is from the Stellarium tunnels. Breaks teeth, builds character.

name: Comet Gummies
description: Neon-bright chews. They taste like battery acid and make the world slow down.

name: Stellar Scone
description: Dry as dust. Requires a drink to swallow. Good for sharing in a foxhole.

name: Void Jerky
description: Tough strips of unknown meat. Numbing. Makes you hit harder just to feel something.

name: Ion Poppers
description: Carbonated stimulant spheres. They pop on your tongue and wake up your optic nerves.

name: Sunder Seeds
description: Hard, bitter pits. Chewing them steels your resolve.

name: Pulse Citrus
description: Synthetic citrus. Sour enough to jumpstart a stopped heart. Tastes like yellow.

name: Iron Biscuit
description: A brick of flour and salt. Heavy in the stomach. You won't feel hunger, or the first punch.

name: Mindfruit Slice
description: Chilled slice of hydroponic luxury. Clears the static in your head.

name: Rattle Pepper
description: Dried chili that rattles. One bite lights a fire in your chest that screams for violence.

name: Slipstream Mochi
description: Sticky rice dough. Frictionless. Swallowing it feels like missing a step on the stairs.

name: Shadow Kelp
description: Slimy strips from the deep tanks. Consuming them tunes your senses, sharpening accuracy.

name: Ember Broth
description: Thermos of spicy broth. Burns going down. Reminds you you're alive.

name: Void Crisp
description: Blackened chips. Salty, brittle, and sharp. Eating them feels like chewing glass, in a good way.

name: Keystone
description: The Keystone emits a low hum.

name: Latte
description: Who doesn't like a good latte?

name: Mining Pistol
description: Standard issue energy cutter modified for personal defense.

name: Medkit
description: A basic first aid kit with bio-sealant and painkillers.

name: Nano Filament
description: A tiny filament.

name: Repaired Arcade Display
description: This ought to fix up the arcade cabinet at the diner.

name: Repaired Coffee Grinder
description: Maddie's repaired industrial coffee grinder. Back to the grind with you!

name: Repaired Projector
description: The school's repaired projector. Good as new.

name: Schematic: Power Lens Mk. I
description: A blueprint detailing how to construct an enhanced Power Lens.

name: Mine Access Badge
description: A magnetic pass that unlocks sealed sections of the Stellarium mines.

name: The Tuning Fork
description: An ancient Echo Relic. It hums with a frequency that makes your teeth ache.

name: Ghost Signal Cell
description: A resonant battery from the Old World. Dominion calls it a Ghost Signal Cell. Jed called it a Chime.

name: Corrosive Rounds
description: Ammo modification that drips with molecular acid.

name: Pulse Grenade
description: Standard issue mining explosive. Designed to crack rocks; equally effective on ribs.

name: Ration Pack
description: Compressed protein slabs, caffeine chews, and a flask of electrolyte soup. Restores 40 HP.

name: Energy Core
description: A stabilized energy core destined for Jed's workshop.

name: Herb
description: A fragrant herb that brightens most dishes.

name: Noodles
description: Compressed noodles that boil quickly in the field.

name: Fiery Pepper
description: A scorching pepper harvested near geothermal vents.

name: Beast Meat
description: Lean meat carved from the local megafauna.

name: Spicy Ramen
description: A blazing broth that clears the mind and sharpens focus.

name: Ballistic Weave
description: Reinforced fiber sheets used as a base for armor mods.

name: Wiring Bundle
description: A bundle of insulated wiring for delicate repairs.

name: Focusing Lens
description: Polished glass that channels energy weapons to a finer point.

name: Cryo-Inductor
description: A cryogenic coil taken from damaged refrigeration rigs.

name: Functional Cryo-Inductor
description: A repaired cryo-inductor ready for mission-critical rigs.

name: Armor Plating Mk. I
description: A simple plating kit that reinforces light armor.

name: Insulated Lining
description: A custom lining that protects against electrical discharge.

name: Ergonomic Grip
description: A hand-crafted grip that steadies most firearms.

name: Power Lens Mk. I
description: An upgraded lens that boosts energy weapon output.

name: Field Rod
description: A collapsible starter rod for quiet water and small catches.

name: Resin Rod
description: A lighter rod with steadier pull control.

name: Carbon Thread Rod
description: A tuned rod that handles sudden glow-water surges.

name: Plain Chime Lure
description: A simple lure that clicks faintly in moving water.

name: Glimmer Lure
description: A reflective lure that flashes through mineral-rich water.

name: Ghost-Signal Lure
description: A lure with an unstable signal bead.

name: Raw Glowfish
description: A small fish with mineral light under its skin. Useful for provisions.

name: Resonance Carp
description: A broad glow-water carp that hums when handled.

name: Chime Minnow
description: A rare tiny fish whose bones ring like glass.

name: Old Boot
description: Waterlogged, sturdy, and probably not edible.

name: Ration Soup
description: A warmed ration broth with enough herbs to taste alive. Restores 60 HP.

name: Glowfish Broth
description: Mineral-rich fish broth that steadies the hands. Restores 80 HP and improves accuracy briefly.

name: Adrenaline Ampoule
description: A concentrated shot that sharpens reflexes in a pinch.

name: Fire Grenade
description: An incendiary grenade that bursts into a short-lived flame pool.

name: Power Cell
description: A charged cell that fuels field gadgets.

name: Chemical Catalyst
description: Stabilizes volatile mixtures when crafting first-aid kits.

name: Medkit+
description: An upgraded medkit packed with regenerative nanofibers.

name: Vial of Venom
description: A sealed vial of corrosive venom harvested from wasteland fauna.

name: Lettuce
description: Fresh greens cultivated in the hub hydroponics bay.

name: Holo Charm
description: A flickering charm that projects soothing light patterns.

name: Kinetic Bracelet
description: Bracelet that channels surplus motion into reactive armor.

name: Precision Sight
description: A slim optic that rewards clean shots.

name: Stability Gyro
description: A spinning core that keeps balance under fire.

name: Vital Signet
description: An etched ring that reinforces the wearer's pulse.

name: Focus Conduit
description: A crystal conduit that steadies focus and intent.

name: Shadow Coil
description: A coiled tether that helps you slip out of sightlines.

name: Brutal Charm
description: A weighted charm tuned for brutal follow-through.

name: Lucky Talisman
description: A chipped charm that tilts odds in your favor.

name: Reactive Plating
description: Microplates that harden just before impact.

name: Neural Stabilizer
description: Medical-grade stabilizer. Reduces neural noise and restores focus.

name: Precision Core
description: Micro-stabilizers tuned for pinpoint strikes.

name: Stability Gyro Mod
description: Gyroscopic ring that anchors stance under recoil.

name: Impact Node
description: Power cell that boosts impact force on contact.

name: Bulwark Layer
description: Dense weave that absorbs the first hit.

name: Focus Matrix
description: Neural grid that sharpens skill execution.

name: Velocity Spool
description: Kinetic ribbon that keeps you moving.

name: Razor Capacitor
description: Overclocked capacitor that sharpens cutting arcs.

name: Coil Synchronizer
description: Synchronizes firing coils for steadier aim.

name: Recoil Dampener
description: Mag-brace that tames kick and keeps shots true.

name: Execution Servo
description: Servo assist for finishing strikes.

name: Ablative Mesh
description: Layered mesh that absorbs burst damage.

name: Shock Lattice
description: Insulated lattice that disperses energy surges.

name: Adaptive Padding
description: Reactive padding that reinforces weak points.

name: Warding Matrix
description: Dampening nodes that blunt incoming strikes.

name: Armor Plate
description: A thick sheet of composite armor plating.

name: Battery
description: A standard energy cell for powering small electronics.

name: Hydraulic Fluid
description: Pressurized fluid salvaged from heavy machinery.

name: Heavy Gear
description: An industrial-grade gear used in mining vehicles.

name: Medkit I
description: A compact Dominion first-aid pack stocked for minor burns, cuts, and pressure bruises.

name: Shipment Log
description: A stamped logistics slate showing rerouted cutter parts and sealed cargo transfers.

name: Data Logs
description: Encrypted server exports documenting colony liability flags and deleted security orders.

name: Admin Badge
description: A clipped-on Dominion credential with enough authority to open a few wrong doors.

name: Crew Datapad
description: A cracked shift pad full of final check-ins from a crew that never made it back to the lifts.

name: Warden Keycard
description: A high-security keycard found on the Dominion Warden.

name: Source Resin
description: Solidified resonance residue that stabilizes energy flow.

name: Rapid Capacitor
description: Overclocked capacitor that speeds up skill cooling cycles.

name: Neon Band
description: A band of woven synthetic fiber that pulses with neon light, improving focus and critical hit rates.

name: Neon Sign Core
description: A glass-sealed gas core for a high-intensity neon sign. Buzzes when held.

name: Hacked Blueprints
description: Blueprints of the Great Elevator's security grid, hacked from Zeke's workstation.

name: The Lens
description: A relic that reveals hidden paths, Shield gaps, and the weak harmonic structure inside enemy armor.

name: Encrypted Ledger
description: A locked executive ledger full of private deals, leverage, and expensive sins.

name: Phase Rounds
description: Experimental ammunition that flickers through armor plating before collapsing back into force.

name: Heat Liner
description: A Foundry thermal liner that turns lethal ambient heat into a survivable problem.

name: Gh0st Override Key
description: A small black chip Gh0st gives Nova after Project Phantom. It can interrupt his kill-suite if the failsafe takes control again.

name: Explosive Tip
description: A weapon mod that adds volatile impact charges to precision shots.

name: Coolant System
description: An armor mod that pumps emergency coolant through heat-stressed plating.

name: The Anvil
description: A relic that shapes Source intent into temporary constructs. It answers confidence and punishes doubt.

name: Deep-Core Engine
description: The Foundry heart meant to power the Ascension Cradle. In the Astra, it can push high orbit.

name: Phase-Cutter Arrays
description: Ship-scale arrays that let the Astra slice through orbital interference and fight back.

name: Thermal Clip
description: A weapon mod that channels Foundry heat into ammunition for burn damage.

name: Grav-Boots
description: Station-grade boots that impose a local down direction when the Ring loses gravity.

name: Mag-Boots
description: Magnetic soles that lock onto metal decking and resist forced movement.

name: The Anchor
description: An Architect relic that fixes a chosen moment in place, imposing stillness on matter and Source alike.

name: SysAdmin Keycard
description: A dead administrator's credential with executive armory clearance.

name: Void Clip
description: A weapon mod that phases a portion of each shot through conventional armor.

name: The Key
description: An impossibly old instrument and access token carrying root authority over the Source.

name: Starborn
description: An impossible weapon mod forged from the Astra's future hull. It converts shared resonance into overwhelming impact.

name: Thermal Cutter
description: A Dominion salvage torch tuned to cauterize Sector 9 razor-vines before they release toxic spores.
